title: wedelia asperrima
intro: Wedelia asperrima, also known as bitter buttonweed or rough wedelia, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, offering several health benefits. In herbal preparations, Wedelia asperrima is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
